docket_entries.description: SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT REESE, STEPHEN EARL SABEK, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-04-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-30-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-20-2005
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-11-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-11-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: ANTHONY VAUGHN (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-14-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-04-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-14-2005 CONTINUED TO FEB-15-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). DEC-14-2005 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT REESE, STEPHEN EARL SABEK, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-15-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
